400.a: The longest and most complex arc — exploring what it means to be human through an ant who develops emotion

400.q: Who is Itachi Uchiha?

400.a: A genre where a character is transported to another world — Re:Zero, Sword Art Online, Slime

600.q: What is the Void Century in One Piece?
